author: Anonymous
title: Versus de ordine missae (BnF lat. 11579, f. 150r-150v)
remarks: BnF lat. 11579, f. 150r-150v [See pdf and doc transcription]. 98 lines of rhyming couplets in a tortured hexameter. A free adaptation of Amalarian themes: no sign of Ivo or Hildabert except the word "praecinuisse"
